title: Joint Probability Distribution Flowchart
description: A visual guide to understanding, calculating, and applying joint probability distributions for discrete and continuous random variables.
elements: Two or more random variables (X, Y, ...)
Probability Mass Function (PMF) for discrete variables
Probability Density Function (PDF) for continuous variables
relationships: Random variables map outcomes from a sample space to numerical values
The Joint PMF/PDF assigns a probability/likelihood to each combination of these values
Summing/Integrating the joint distribution over one variable yields the marginal distribution for the other
The conditional distribution is derived from the joint distribution divided by the marginal distribution
